title: Pan-Seared Nectarine with Kadhai Greek Yogurt Sauce
description: A sweet and savory dessert featuring pan-seared nectarine topped with a tangy kadhai Greek yogurt sauce.
instructions: 1. Cut the nectarine into 1-inch slices and set aside.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the Greek yogurt, kadhai powder, and honey.
3. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
4. Add the nectarine slices to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
5. Remove the nectarine from the pan and place on a plate.
6. Top the nectarine with the kadhai yogurt sauce.
7. Drizzle with a pinch of salt and serve immediately.
